name: 酸碱
subject: science
curriculum_points: Students in MYP 3-4 will be able to use the pH scale to classify solutions as acidic, basic, or neutral, and safely use indicators to test common household substances.
Students will be able to describe the properties of acids and bases, and explain the process of neutralization with examples from everyday life (e.g., indigestion remedies).
